_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

ICICIBANK.name: ICICIBANK
ICICIBANK.data_warning: Signals based on 2026-07-14 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Verify in Kite before trading.
ICICIBANK.commentary: WAIT (CE 2/6, PE 1/6 -- neither side reached the 4-vote threshold): price 1397.6 is above EMA18 (1380.82) and EMA50 (1340.98) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (25.34) is below its signal line (27.66) -- bearish momentum (+1 PE) | price is between pivot support (1392.87) and resistance (1419.57) -- no breakout yet | 5-day momentum (ROC5 -1.21%) is muted -- no edge from this factor ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations. A high vote count means one strong trend measured 4 ways, not 4 separate signals agreeing.
